tagline: Rebuild your encyclopedia from source files.
longDescription:
Compiles the eight modular source files of your Encyclopedia into one unified, narratively coherent life-history document — designed to be read as a comprehensive biography, both now and decades from now. Run it monthly (or whenever you say "compile my encyclopedia") and the skill reads every source file, internalizes the content, then writes a single document with one consistent voice and structure rather than a section-per-file dump.

Four detail levels (Full, Personal, Professional, Public) control how much intimate detail surfaces in the output, so the same encyclopedia can produce a private full-fat version for yourself and a sharable Professional version for a job application. The compiled output saves to `~/.claude/encyclopedia/Encyclopedia.md` and gets versioned so you can compare year-over-year.
